title: Determine the exact value of R(P12, P12, P12)
micro_paper_assessment: Exact closure would still be a strong micro-paper target, but the current solve output is only a theorem-facing slice: a rigorous K21 lower-bound witness and a 22-vertex obstruction for the monochromatic-part four-block template family.
family_affinity: High: this is directly in the diagonal three-color path Ramsey line and uses the standard four-block path-avoiding template language.
generalization_signal: Moderate: the four-block largest-part obstruction appears reusable for nearby even-path template families, but the non-template 22-vertex case remains uncontrolled.
candidate_theorem_slice: In the four-block matching-template family with monochromatic parts, the largest 3-coloring with no monochromatic P12 has order 21; in particular, no 22-vertex member of that family avoids a monochromatic P12.
next_action: Try to prove that every 22-vertex P12-avoiding coloring must reduce to the four-block template language, or else find a genuinely non-template K22 witness.
